front: Author: 'The End of Imagination' is this author's essay against India's nuclear testing at Pokharan
Author: 'The Algebra of Infinite Justice' is this author's essay collection criticizing the Bush administration's response to 9/11
Author: attacked Gandhi as a 'Saint of the Status-Quo' who did not sufficiently renounce the caste system
Author: donated Booker Prize money to fight dam construction, funding the Narmada Bachao Andolan
Author: declared 'another world is not only possible, she is on her way' at the 2003 World Social Forum
Author: calls herself the 'twin' of Uruguayan author Eduardo Galeano; once turned down modeling khakis for The Gap
